title: CREATE TABLE AS fails with a false report of database corruption
description:
drh added on 2015-09-09 12:34:14:
The second statement in the following script reports an SQLITE_CORRUPT error:
CREATE TABLE t1(a);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT name FROM sqlite_master;
The database is not actually corrupt.  This is a malfunction in the CREATE TABLE AS statement.
Bisecting indicates that this problem was introduced by check-in
[972881c6d3] on 2013-11-21, first released with version 3.8.2.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id UInt32, name String, age UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE temp_users AS SELECT * FROM users WHERE age > 25 ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE orders(order_id UInt32, user_id UInt32, amount Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY order_id;
INSERT INTO orders(user_id, amount) VALUES((SELECT id FROM users WHERE name = 'Alice'), 99.99);
